report.summary: Cycle-close v16: 37 pages published today (17 batches), all 37 verified with page.tsx. 2 queue items ready to promote. 6/6 API routes healthy. 5 files with TS errors (4 learn pages + structured-data.examples.ts). git index.lock persists since 09:58 — 87 pending files still uncommitted, no new deploy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 520 unique published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 103 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged — wallets, taxes, investing, blog, older learn guides)
All 37 pages published today (batches 1-17) verified: every page.tsx exists on disk
2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items (solver-networks, aptos-blockchain) both have page.tsx — ready to promote

5 files with TypeScript errors: 4 learn page.tsx files (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption, lido-v3) + structured-data.examples.ts — likely JSX escaping issues with > and $ characters
10 new OG SVGs generated (untracked) for recent batches
Production site unreachable from sandbox (egress blocked) — cannot verify HTTP 200 remotely; local file audit is green
No new regressions detected vs v15

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present and structurally sound: prices (60s TTL), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (TTL in code)
All routes implement in-memory cache + stale-while-revalidate pattern (2x TTL for SWR)
Health endpoint (/api/health) checks CoinGecko, analytics, and cache services
Additional API routes: cache-stats, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, og, subscribe, standup-email
No code changes to API routes this cycle — all stable
No rate limit or stale data issues detectable from code analysis

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
No new deploy triggered this cycle — all current changes are local only
BLOCKER PERSISTS: .git/index.lock created at 09:58 today — blocking all git commits for 6+ hours
Working tree: 21 modified files + 66 untracked files = 87 total pending changes
Modified files include: published-pages.ts (37 new pages), globals.css, NotificationCenter, WhaleAlertFeed, 6 learn page fixes, 5 OG SVG updates
next.config.ts healthy: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, image optimization with AVIF/WebP
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock → stage changes → commit → trigger Vercel deploy to push 17 batches live

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED (local): 37 pages added to published-pages.ts today across 17 batches (learn guides + 5 ecosystem deep-dives)
PUBLISH QUEUE: 2 items remain (solver-networks-order-flow-auctions, aptos-blockchain) — both page.tsx files exist, ready to promote
DELTA since v15: No code changes — this is a status-only checkpoint confirming v15 findings
CARRY-OVER: Resolve git index.lock → commit 87 pending changes → Vercel deploy
CARRY-OVER: Fix TS errors in 4 learn pages + structured-data.examples.ts (JSX escaping)
CARRY-OVER: 103 published slugs without page.tsx (long-standing legacy gap)
BLOCKER FOR JEFE: git index.lock has persisted all day across 16 review cycles — prevents any deploy. Must be manually cleared.
